title: Robust Refreshing Greek Yogurt Tzatziki
description: A fermented and adventurous Greek dish featuring chimichurri sauce, this tzatziki is perfect for hot summer days, and its ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients make it a great choice for a healthy snack. The combination of broiled ingredients and fresh yogurt creates a bouncy and refreshing texture.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the chimichurri sauce, garlic, and lemon juice.
In a large bowl, combine the Greek yogurt, cucumber, dill, salt, and black pepper, and stir well.
Add the chimichurri sauce mixture to the yogurt mixture and stir until smooth.
Brush the olive oil on a baking sheet and broil the mixture for 2 minutes, or until slightly browned.
Remove the mixture from the oven and let it cool to room temperature.
Refrigerate the mixture for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the tzatziki chilled, garnished with additional dill if desired.
